summary: Great audience recording of a high‑energy 10/72 show, highlighted by a gorgeous Stella Blue, sizzling Deal and an epic Dark Star.
review: The tape captures a vibrant two‑hour first set with standout performances of Stella Blue, Deal and a soaring Dark Star. Reviewers rave about the depth, warmth and overall clarity of the audience recording despite occasional “cloudy” moments and a lower‑generation patch source, making it a highly enjoyable listen.

ai_rating.rationale: The majority of reviews are 5‑star praises focusing on strong musical performance and generally good audio quality; a few lower ratings note minor tape‑generation or sound clarity issues, yielding an overall high but not perfect rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Audience cassette sources stitched together (first night plus later tape from a friend). Reviewers note some cloudy sound and a lower‑generation patch, but overall the mix is warm, clear enough for a great listening experience.

show_quality.setlist_flow: High‑energy two‑hour first set with strong pacing; the show maintains momentum throughout and delivers memorable improvisational peaks.
